titleStmt.title: SII 29.69: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 69. (A.R. No. 87 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALAGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar (No. 8) dugout from the main street in the village.

Mentions that Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla was then ruling the empire from the capital Kalyāṇapura. It records gift of ten nivarttanas of land each to the brāhmaṇas Kēśavabhaṭṭōpādhyāya, son of Mailara-nāyaka of Śānḍilya-gōtra and Vāmana-bhaṭṭa, son of Penna-bhaṭṭa of Bhāradvāja-gōtra under the main canal of the Brihat-taṭāka in the village Nellūṭu, and to Golaya-bhaṭṭōpādhyāya, son of Ellaṇa-bhaṭṭōpādhyāya of Harita-gōtra under the main canal of the village Vaḍḍagicheruvu, both situated in Kaluvachēḍu-40, a kaṁpaṇa of Koḷḷipāka-dēśa, by prince Sōmēśvara. Besides 40 nivarttanas of wet land and two house-sites were granted to each of the above mentioned donees in their respective villages.
The record is dated in the Chālukya Vikrama year 37, [Śaka 1034] Nandana, dakshiṇāyaṇasaṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1112 A.D., June 26, [Wednesday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayati dhṛtadharāḍhyā
yasya daṁṣṭrāgra kōṭīsphura
tē mṛdumyaṇālī sūkṣma paṁ
kāṁkitēvasanijakhura puṭā
grakṣaṁṇa pātālapālapraba
ladanu sutāriḥ krōḍarūpō
murāriḥ . Anupama nija
śauryyaṁ kṛppavidviṣṭa lakṣmīrvvi
naya vinata mitrakvatra
rakṣātidakṣaḥ Anavarata
kṛtānēkāṣṭhi vikhyāta kīrttiḥ
sakalanṛpa guṇāḍhyā
bhāti cāḷukya vaṁśaḥ . tasmā
dudētyakṛtavatsunṛpē
ṣurājyaṁ satyāśrayādi
ṣu bahuṣvanu gamya dharmmaṁ
jātastatō bahu kalānidhi vē
śvarāṁśō bhūmērbbabhūva pa
ti rāhavamallidēvaḥ . ta
syātmajō vikrama cakrava
rtti permmāḍi rājñājita rāja
lōkaḥ viṣṇōrivāṁ śōdharaṇīṁ
vidhātuṁ niṣkaṁṭakāṁ jātaiva
prasiddhaḥ . tasminsamasta bhuva
nāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya kula
tilaka cālukyābharaṇa śrī

matribhuvanamalla vallabhēṁ
dro kalyāṇa puranivēśita
nijavijayaskaṁdhāvārē su
khēna rājya sukhamanubha
vati . tatkuṁtalēśasya su
taḥ kumāraḥ sōmēśvarō
durddama bāhuśaktiḥ ni
śāta bāṇāhata vairidai
tyāvirājatē śāśvata rā
jyalakṣmīḥ . sa samasta ma
hāniyamahimāttuṁ
ga cāḷukya gaṁga vijayala
kṣmī nivāsa dakṣiṇadōrdda
ṇḍa dvādaka maṇḍiḷika
maṇḍala mārtāṇḍa pratā
pākrāṁta navakhaṇḍa
bhūmaṇḍala rājavēlaṁca
matkṛtākhaṇḍala tribhuva
naraṁga pravarttita kī
rtinartakī sūtradhāra
śaraṇāgata vajraprākā
śa vibudha ciṁtāmaṇi
maṇḍaḷika makuṭa cū
ḍāmaṇi kuntala rājyā
bhyudaya kāraṇa bappa
na gaṁdhavāraṇa śrīmanma

hāmaṇṇalēśvaraḥ kumāraḥ
sōmēśvara dēvō nijōpa
bhujyamāda kollipāka dē
śa pratibaddha . kaluva cēḍa
kaṁpaṇaka . catvāriṁśadgrāmē
ṣu madhye nellūṭu grāmē
bṛhattaṭākōpa bṛṁpāta bṛ
hatkulyāyāḥ prathama
pravēśa mukhē daśanivarttanāṁ
pānīya bhuvaṁ śrīmaccāḷu
kya vikrama varṣa saptatriṁśa
ttamē nandana saṁvatsarē dakṣi
ṇāyana saṁkrāṁti nimitta śāṁ
ḍilya gōtrāya śrīmanmaylā
ra nāyaka putrāya kē
śava bhaṭṭōpādhyāyāya
dattavān . tathā vaḍḍagi ceṟu
vulu grāmē laghutaṭākō
pa bṛṁpāta bṛhatkulyāyāṁ
prathama pravēśa mukhē daśani
varttanāṁ pānīya bhuvaṁ hāri
ta gōtrāya śrīmaddellana bha
bhaṭṭōpādhyāya putrāya gō
laya bhaṭṭōpādhyāyāya
tasminnēva nimittē dhattavān .

tadhā tasminnēva nellūṭu
grāmē tatkēśava bhaṭṭō
pādhyāya kēdāranaṁ
taraṁdaśanivarttanāṁbu
bhaṁvaṁ bhāradvāja gōtra
pennabhaṭṭa putra vāmana
bhaṭṭāya dattavān . tēbhya
stri bhyastattadgrāmē pratyē
kaṁ catvāriṁśannivarttana ka
raṁbubhuvaṁ gṛhasthā
nadvayaṁ ca dattavān .
bahubhirvva sudhā dattā
rājabhiḥ sagarādi bhiḥ .
yasya yasya yadā bhū
mistasya tasya tadā
phalaṁ . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vāyō harēta
vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . śatru
ṇāpi kṛtō dharmmaḥ pā
lanīyaṁ prayatnataḥ śa
tru tēva pāśatruḥ syāddha
rmmaḥ śatrurnna kasyabit .
Digital edition of SII 29.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
